title: Your Privacy Matters
subtitle: Learn how RCS Infra Tech collects, uses, protects, and manages your information while providing enterprise technology solutions.

sections.title: Introduction
content: Welcome to RCS Infra Tech. We value your privacy and are committed to protecting the personal information you share with us.
This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect information when you visit our website or interact with our services.
By using this website, you agree to the practices described in this Privacy Policy.

sections.title: Information We Collect
content: We may collect personal information such as your name, company name, email address, phone number, and project requirements when you submit forms or contact us.
Technical information including browser type, operating system, IP address, device information, and pages visited may also be collected automatically to improve website performance.

sections.title: How We Use Your Information
content: Information collected through our website is used to respond to enquiries, provide requested services, improve user experience, communicate project updates, and enhance our solutions.
We may also use anonymous analytics data to understand website performance and optimize content.

sections.title: Cookies & Analytics
content: Our website uses cookies and similar technologies to improve functionality, analyze traffic, remember preferences, and measure website performance.
Analytics tools such as Google Analytics, Google Tag Manager, and Microsoft Clarity may collect anonymous usage data.

sections.title: Third-Party Services
content: We may use trusted third-party services including Google Analytics, Google Tag Manager, Google Search Console, Google reCAPTCHA, Microsoft Clarity, cloud hosting providers, and email communication platforms.
These providers maintain their own privacy practices and policies.

sections.title: Data Security
content: We implement appropriate administrative, technical, and organizational safeguards to protect your information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.
Although we follow industry best practices, no internet transmission or storage system can be guaranteed to be completely secure.

sections.title: Data Retention
content: Personal information is retained only as long as necessary to provide services, comply with legal obligations, resolve disputes, and maintain business records.

sections.title: Your Rights
content: Depending on applicable laws, you may request access to your personal information, request corrections, request deletion where legally permitted, or withdraw consent for specific processing activities.

sections.title: External Links
content: Our website may contain links to external websites operated by third parties. We are not responsible for the privacy practices or content of those websites.

sections.title: Changes to This Policy
content: This Privacy Policy may be updated periodically to reflect changes in legal requirements, technologies, or our business practices. Updates become effective immediately upon publication.

sections.title: Contact Us
content: If you have any questions regarding this Privacy Policy or how your information is handled, please contact RCS Infra Tech through our website or official email address.
